title: William Keeney
compiled_truth: William Keeney is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-24 to 2001-07-28), William Keeney sent 8 and received 66 emails, totalling 74 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (6), [Tom May](people/tom-may) (5), [David Marks](people/david-marks) (5), [Janelle Scheuer](people/janelle-scheuer) (5), [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (1).
